playbooks.title: Mob smoke test (creative)
steps: Summon with `/summon <modid>:<registry_name> ~ ~ ~` after registering renderer (or invisible entity is OK for AI-only).
Verify goals: leap triggers beyond melee range; slam when close; baby zombies only if `summon_on_hurt` enabled.
Check server log for attribute registration errors — `EntityAttributeCreationEvent` must reference your `ENTITY` registry object.

playbooks.title: GeckoLib merge order
steps: Get Forge client booting with vanilla renderer/cube first.
Add GeckoLib dependency; implement `GeoEntity` on the same class or a thin subclass.
Blockbench export → `assets/<modid>/geo` + `animations`; match animation names in `AnimationController`.
